{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212129450C48F8D182537CA92E92"}"},"total":746},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526114979441623870","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油作者，很喜欢看这一类的小说，需要动脑子的小说让我选择的话，我更喜欢看这科研侧之类的，不喜欢那些乱七八糟的阴谋诡计。（单女，日常，研究。我喜欢的词条叠满了）加油好看爱看多更"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752317735,"group_id":"7363131762727193625","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"戴着扎腰子","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N38M1wfexBjIbjAK202Qnf4svOpWtb63rMK+1anUdTjo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10bafcbbd68b48819d60dfb8de2eea0e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620780&x-signature=ZgH2YjHhDdR1u4c8q64iNZOPhJc%3D","user_id":"3637659129093768","user_name":"荆棘腰带"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3637659129093768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363131762727193625","book_info":{"abstract":"【法师、男频、单女主、详细的异世界求生经历、慢热。】

一觉醒来，研究生梁夏做实验猝死，莫名其妙转生成了异世界濒死的流浪儿。

这里魔法绚烂，魔兽横行，而他的全部家当只有瘦弱的身体与饥饿的胃。

他入乡随俗，给自己起了个Cozy的名字，没有系统，没有老爷爷，他只能凭着疑似前世世界馈赠的丐版“神识”，向村民学习最基本的打猎，一寸一寸夺回生存的权利。

他狩猎，他交易，他与商人经营商会，在刀尖上积攒每一枚铜币。

目标清晰无比：攒够学费，进入魔法学院，获得那份传说中“法师的安逸”。

吃饱喝足就安逸了，考上法师学院就能彻底安逸了，法师学院毕业是真的真的真的安逸了。救命，中式教育还在追我！

当他终于推开学院大门，萌发第一株魔法幼苗时，新的“欲望”却在灼烧他——这个世界没有游戏，没有电影，没有火锅。

可恶！我把快餐弄出来了，麻辣小龙虾也有了，魔兽都开始养殖化了，钱都赚够了，到底什么时候才能真的安逸啊？

什么？还想看电影玩游戏？那行吧，再努努力吧，任重而道远啊。

可恶啊，五年级还要进行最终法师考核，那就只能再踏上冒险的旅途了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fd0bde7068c4d58ed3e1f630301dbf7d","author":"亿只流浪猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7363131762727193625","book_name":"我在奇幻世界活得很安逸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363131825226531353","read_count":"47031","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2083590"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"938","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,奇幻仙侠,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0c2c060c0cd054ec603b7e587aec290d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283785&x-signature=rg1JE1JjkwNlZN2vqi2LMDvH%2FGk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3095846808203591","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"506"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212129450C48F8D182537CA92E92"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwa
